LightningComponentBundle.description: Premium business account profile: Account SOQL, optional assembly Flow (flow:VarName), Insight prediction Flow, Einstein summary, Nominatim/Photon geocoding and lightning-map (same patterns as Customer Profile widget), 42 themes.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Profile assembly Flow API name
property.description: Optional autolaunched flow. Must accept the Account Id on the variable named in Flow record Id variable (default recordId). In each field mapping below, use flow:OutputVariableApiName for a flow output, or an Account field path for SOQL (e.g. Name, BillingCity, Custom__c, Owner.Name); paths are validated against the Account schema.

property.name: flowRecordIdVariable
property.label: Flow record Id variable
property.description: Input variable API name on the assembly flow that receives the current Account Id.

property.name: insightFlowApiName
property.label: Autolaunched flow API name (predictions)
property.description: Optional. Same pattern as Customer Profile: flow outputs prediction (text) and recommendations (JSON). If this matches Profile assembly Flow API name and that flow runs for field mappings, outputs are read from the same run.

property.name: geocodeBillingAddress
property.label: Geocode billing address for map
property.description: When true, Apex calls Nominatim then Photon if map coordinates are missing (Remote Site Settings required). Skipped in Apex tests.

property.name: fieldMapLatitude
property.label: Field: map latitude
property.description: Account field API name (e.g. BillingLatitude) or flow:Var for lightning-map marker.

property.name: fieldMapLongitude
property.label: Field: map longitude
property.description: Account field API name (e.g. BillingLongitude) or flow:Var for lightning-map marker.

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template ID
property.description: Einstein prompt template ID or API name for Insight tab narrative.

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name
property.description: Must match a text input on the template; payload includes prediction, predictionType business_profile, and recommendations JSON (same shape as Customer Profile).

property.name: insightRecommendationsPositiveMeansGood
property.label: Insight: treat positive % as good
property.description: When true, positive recommendation bar uses good color (match classification model LWC).

property.name: recordIdFieldName
property.label: Record ID field name
property.description: Reserved for Flow output binding.

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: 42 themes across 8 families. ORIGINAL: obsidian (default), midnight, graphite, ivory. NEUTRALS: dusk, slate, parchment, onyx, fog. GREENS/ORANGES: forest, ember, sage, copper, verdant. BLUES/GREYS: steel, mercury, arctic, indigo, glacier. MID-TONES: bordeaux, pewter, walnut, denim, moss. SF LIGHT: birch, mist, cashew, mineral, blush, chamois. WEALTH MGMT: bullion, prussian, coutts, vault, endowment, trust. BANKING: cobalt, heritage, civic, cardinal, meridian, union. Wealth and banking themes require a matching accentColor override — see documentation.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows 4 theme toggle buttons in the widget header for live switching during demos. Keep false in production.

property.name: accentColor
property.label: Accent color (hex)
property.description: Primary highlight color. Overrides theme default.

property.name: positiveColor
property.label: Positive color (hex)
property.description: Used for insight recommendation bars and positive accents.

property.name: textScalePercent
property.label: [Typography] Text size (%)
property.description: Scales all widget text (85–160). 100 = default design size (same as Customer Profile).

property.name: textEmphasis
property.label: [Typography] Emphasis
property.description: medium: bolder company name/KPIs. strong: also heavier tabs and brighter meta line.

property.name: backgroundLightenPercent
property.label: [Theme] Lighten backgrounds (%)
property.description: 0 = use theme as designed. 1–50 mixes that percentage of white into the main solid backgrounds (shell, panels, surfaces, KPI strip, body) so dark themes read less heavy. Does not change text colors.

property.name: textColorPrimaryOverride
property.label: [Theme] Text color — primary
property.description: Optional. Main titles and values. Hex (#f5f2ea) or rgba(245,242,234,0.95). Empty = use the selected theme.

property.name: textColorSecondaryOverride
property.label: [Theme] Text color — secondary
property.description: Optional. Subtitles and secondary lines. Hex or rgba with lower alpha for softer contrast.

property.name: textColorTertiaryOverride
property.label: [Theme] Text color — muted
property.description: Optional. Captions and tab labels. Hex or rgba.

property.name: profilePhotoUrl
property.label: [Deprecated] Static logo URL
property.description: Deprecated: use Field: header logo (field or flow:Var). If set, overrides mapped logo and website favicon.

property.name: profilePhotoFlowOutputVariable
property.label: [Deprecated] Flow logo output variable
property.description: Deprecated: use Field: header logo with value flow:VariableApiName instead.

property.name: assemblyOutProfilePhotoUrl
property.label: [Deprecated] Flow logo variable (alt)
property.description: Deprecated: use Field: header logo only.

property.name: fieldCompanyName
property.label: Field: company name
property.description: Account field API name for SOQL (case-insensitive), e.g. Name. Or flow:OutputVariableApiName when Profile assembly Flow API name is set.

property.name: fieldProfilePhotoUrl
property.label: Field: header logo (image URL)
property.description: Account field API name (text/url) or flow:VariableApiName when Profile assembly Flow is set — same pattern as Field: website. Leave blank to show initials unless Use website logo is enabled.

property.name: useWebsiteFavicon
property.label: Use website for logo (favicon)
property.description: When Field: header logo is blank, derive a logo from Field: website: tries a direct https image URL, then that site’s /favicon.ico and apple-touch-icon, then DuckDuckGo and Google icon URLs until one loads.

property.name: fieldFounded
property.label: Field: year founded
property.description: Date, DateTime, number, or text Account field API name, or flow:Var. Default CreatedDate uses the year of the Account’s Created Date in Salesforce. Set blank to use auto-discovery (custom founded fields first, then CreatedDate last).

property.name: fieldPrimaryRm
property.label: Field: primary RM
property.description: Use Owner.Name for the relationship owner, or map OwnerId / a User Id (005…); Apex resolves User Id to the user’s display name.

property.name: fieldSubsidiaries
property.label: Field: subsidiary count (legacy)
property.description: Unused: Subsidiaries on Overview is the count of related accounts (same as Structure). This property remains for existing Lightning page bindings.

property.name: fieldWalletCapture
property.label: Field: last used channel
property.description: Account field API name for Overview (text or picklist). If blank, Apex tries common names and any field whose label matches “Last used channel”. Picklist values are shown as labels (same as the record page).

property.name: fieldMoodysRating
property.label: Field: Moody's rating (legacy slot)
property.description: Optional legacy text slot. Bureau tab also uses Field: Moody's agency rating / category below.

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: 42 themes across 8 families; wealth and banking presets pair best with a matching accentColor — see component documentation.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows 4 theme toggle buttons in the widget header for live switching during demos. Keep false in production.

property.name: textScalePercent
property.label: [Typography] Text size (%)
property.description: Scales widget text (85–160); 100 = default.

property.name: textColorPrimaryOverride
property.label: [Theme] Text color — primary
property.description: Optional hex (#f5f2ea) or rgba(...). Empty = theme default.

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: 42 themes across 8 families; wealth and banking presets pair best with a matching accentColor — see component documentation.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows 4 theme toggle buttons in the widget header for live switching during demos. Keep false in production.

property.name: textColorPrimaryOverride
property.label: [Theme] Text color — primary
property.description: Optional hex (#f5f2ea) or rgba(...). Empty = theme default.
